div.h2: DML Write Path — INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE
div.p: Buffer pool interaction at every step

g.text: fetch_page(pool, page_id) | pin frame; load from disk on miss
unpin_page(pool, page_id, dirty) | decrement pin_count; set dirty flag
buffer_pool_new_page(pool) | extend file; return fresh page_id
evict_frame() | dirty → journal/WAL write before reuse
flush_all() | fsync journal → write dirty → fsync db
Journal mode | journal fsync BEFORE any db page write
WAL mode | append frame to WAL; fsync on commit frame only
Crash recovery | journal → undo; WAL → redo to last commit
